title: Gently Smoked Portuguese Yogurt Curry
description: A creamy and smoky curry made with yogurt and traditional Portuguese spices, served on a beautiful talavera plate. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner and is ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the yogurt to the saucepan and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the curry for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
Serve on a talavera plate for a beautiful and traditional presentation.
